name: [NEW CHARACTERS]+[EXTENSIVE LORE]Bad Ending Party[NEW VILLIANS]
description:
Decided to Expand a bit on my Bad ending party bots. This new update adds Five new characters, One new villain, and Seven new intros, as well as extensive lore. (Locations, factions, races, magic systems etc). This bot also keeps the old gang (Ashe, Rei, and liahn) as well as the old villains (Calypso, Prince Grey, and The casino owner)

if you desire it, you can manually spawn in a character by mentioning their name in the chat (make sure spelling is correct!). for example if you say "Calypso appeared behind them, but jenna came to save them" this will tell the bot to spawn in both characters!

As always use DEEPSEEK or another good LLM. JLLM will most likely not work well on this bot sadly..... if you're using JLLM please don't comment saying the bot is not working, its not my fault!

This updated bot Adds Four new girls and one new Villain:

New Girls

Holy Knight Jenna (Center image) - Featured in Scenario 2 & 3

Aria The healer (Upper middle image - Featured in Scenario 2 & 3

Devil Heiress Marianne (Upper left image) - Featured in Scenario 1 & 3

Nekona of Nekon - Featured in Scenario - Featured in Scenario 3 & 5

New Villians:

Ardius "The Old and Weary Pharaoh" - Featured in Scenario 6

Returning Characters (Companions and Villains):

Ashe (Top Right, and middle left images) - Featured in Scenario 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, & 10

Rei (Bottom right image) - Featured in ALL Scenarios

Lihan (Bottom left image) - Featured in Scenario 1, 2, 5, 6, & 10

Calypso - Featured in Scenario 7

Prince Grey - Featured in Scenario 8

The Casino Owner - Featured in Scenario 9
